confirm.deleteReportFull: Delete this report and all related analysis and chat history?
confirm.deleteReportsBulk: Delete {{count}} selected reports and all related analysis and chat history?

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Upload financial reports, run analysis, and chat with your documents.
dashboard.noReports: No reports yet. Upload your first financial report to get started.

upload.title: Upload report
upload.subtitle: Upload a PDF, TXT, CSV, or spreadsheet financial report for analysis.
upload.dragDrop: Drag and drop a financial report here
upload.supported: Supported: PDF, TXT, CSV, XLSX, XLS, DOCX (max 25 MB)

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Browse, search, and manage your uploaded financial documents.
reports.noResults: No reports match your search or filters.

reportAnalysis.title: Financial analysis
reportAnalysis.empty: No analysis yet. Click "Run analysis" to generate insights.

chat.title: Discuss this analysis
chat.hint: Ask questions about the results below — answers use your saved analysis.
chat.emptyHint: Discuss the analysis results — try a suggested question or type your own.

prompts.summary: Explain the summary in simple terms
prompts.revenue: Tell me more about the revenue
prompts.risks: What are the main financial risks?
prompts.recommendations: What do you recommend based on this analysis?

reportChat.title: Chat with report
reportChat.hint: Answers are generated from the uploaded document text
reportChat.hintWithAnalysis: Answers are generated from the uploaded document text and analysis results.
reportChat.emptyHint: Ask questions about revenue, expenses, risks, or recommendations.

upload.title: Upload multiple reports
upload.subtitle: Upload two or more financial reports together to analyze them as a group and see the big picture.
upload.dragDrop: Drag and drop multiple financial reports here
upload.minFiles: Please select at least 2 reports for batch analysis.

list.title: Report batches
list.subtitle: Grouped reports analyzed together for combined insights.
list.empty: No batches yet. Upload multiple reports to get started.

analysis.title: Combined analysis — big picture
analysis.empty: No combined analysis yet. Click "Analyze all reports" to summarize the batch.
analysis.savedReportsHint: Each report analysis is saved in the app and used for batch chat.
analysis.noReportAnalysis: No saved analysis for this report yet.

chat.title: Discuss this combined analysis
chat.hint: Ask about the big picture — answers use the combined and per-report analyses.
chat.emptyHint: Discuss the batch results — try a suggested question or ask your own.

prompts.revenue: What is the total revenue across reports?
prompts.risks: What are the main risks across all reports?

chat.title: Chat with batch
chat.emptyHint: Ask about totals, trends, risks, or comparisons across all reports in this batch.
chat.hintWithAnalysis: Answers use saved combined and per-report analyses.
chat.runAnalysisFirst: Run combined analysis first to save insights, then chat about the big picture.

confirm.delete: Delete this batch and all its reports, analyses, and chat history?

savedAnalyses.listSubtitle: Financial analysis results you saved with a custom title.
savedAnalyses.empty: No saved analyses yet. Run an analysis and click "Save analysis".
savedAnalyses.saveDialogHint: Give this analysis a title. The file is saved with a timestamp name in reports_analyzes.
savedAnalyses.editHint: Edit the full analysis report below. Use headings, fonts, links, and images as needed.
savedAnalyses.reanalyzeDialogHint: Describe what you want the analysis to focus on — specific metrics, risks, questions, or business areas. The report will be analyzed again using these criteria.
savedAnalyses.reanalyzeCriteriaPlaceholder: e.g. Focus on cash flow trends, compare revenue by region, and highlight liquidity risks for Q2.
savedAnalyses.reanalyzeCriteriaRequired: Please enter criteria or questions for the re-analysis.
savedAnalyses.reanalyzeSuccess: Analysis updated with your new focus.
savedAnalyses.customSectionsHint: Add your own notes, auditor comments, or extra financial details.
savedAnalyses.noCustomSections: No additional sections yet. Click "Add section" to include extra information.

settings.title: Company settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your page title, logo, and company profile for introductions and printing.
settings.bilingualHint: Enter information in both English and Arabic. The app shows the version matching your selected language.
settings.bilingualRequired: Please enter at least the company name and page title in English or Arabic.
settings.taglinePlaceholder: Short description shown under the title
settings.introductionHint: Rich introduction for reports, proposals, or printed company profiles.
settings.setupLink: Set up your company profile in Settings
settings.profileEmptyHint: Add your logo, address, history, and introduction to build a printable company profile.
